chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5028 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.22350/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 08.04.2025 Mr.Adil Saeed, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Respondent. Learned counsel for the respondent Department under instructions states that the impugned notices have been withdrawn, hence, no grievance of the petitioner subsists. In view of such material representation learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition appears to have served its purpose, therefore, it may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
